description: Bayer's $66 billion acquisition of Monsanto (2016-2018) was one of the most controversial corporate deals in history, triggering intense activist, environmental, and regulatory pushback due to Monsanto's reputation.

key_events.description: International protests erupt against the combination of chemical and seed companies.
EU regulatory concerns lead to required divestitures of assets.
Merger completes, but legal liabilities regarding Roundup emerge, damaging public sentiment.

calibration_notes: Shows how reputation transfer (the 'Monsanto brand effect') can permanently depress support for an acquisition.
